---
title: "Artificial Intelligence"
---

This guide covers the key concepts of artificial intelligence, from classical machine learning to modern deep learning and transformer architectures.

## Overview

- [Statistical Learning vs. Machine Learning vs. Deep Learning](learning-paradigms.qmd) — what separates the three paradigms and what unites them

## Machine Learning

Foundational techniques for learning from data:

- [Machine Learning](machine-learning.qmd) — supervised vs. unsupervised learning, bias-variance tradeoff
- [Cross-Validation](cross-validation.qmd) — model evaluation and resampling strategies
- [Parsnip](parsnip.qmd) — unified modeling interface in R (tidymodels)

## Deep Learning

Building blocks of neural networks:

- [Deep Learning](deep-learning.qmd) — neurons, layers, architectures, regularization
- [Activation Functions](activation-functions.qmd) — ReLU, sigmoid, softmax
- [Loss Functions](loss-function.qmd) — MAE, MSE, cross-entropy
- [Optimizers](optimizers.qmd) — SGD, Adam, learning rate
- [Tensors](tensors.qmd) — the fundamental data structure

## Transformers & Large Language Models

- [Transformers](transformers.qmd) — attention mechanism, encoder-decoder architecture
- [Foundation Models](foundation-models.qmd) — Llama, Gemma, Mistral, DeepSeek
- [HuggingFace Transformers](hg-transformers.qmd) — `pipeline()` API and practical usage

## Resources

- [Fundamental Papers](fundamental-papers.qmd) — landmark papers from 1943 to today
- [References](references.qmd) — additional reading and links
- [Jupyter](jupyter.qmd) — notebook tips and workflows
- [Kaggle](kaggle.qmd) — competitions and notebooks

## Online Courses

- [FreeCodeCamp — Python](https://www.freecodecamp.org/learn/python-v9/#lecture-introduction-to-python)
- [Kaggle Learn — Intro to Deep Learning](https://www.kaggle.com/learn/intro-to-deep-learning)
- [fast.ai](https://course.fast.ai/)
- [DeepLearning.AI — Deep Learning Specialization](https://www.coursera.org/specializations/deep-learning)
- [Machine Learning in Python with scikit-learn (INRIA)](https://lms.fun-mooc.fr/courses/course-v1:inria+41026+session04/info)
- [LLM University (Cohere)](https://cohere.com/llmu)
- [PyTorch Tutorials](https://docs.pytorch.org/tutorials/beginner/basics/quickstart_tutorial.html)
